name: Carrot Muffins with Walnut-Cream Centers WW
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Orange juice concentrate (no sugar added)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Line a 12-cup muffin tin with paper baking cups and set aside.
3. In a large bowl, combine flour, 1/3 cup sugar, and baking soda; stir until combined.
4. Add raisins and gently mix to coat.
5. Stir in margarine until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
6. In another bowl, whisk together buttermilk, egg substitute, orange juice concentrate, and vanilla extract.
7. Gently fold this liquid mixture into the dry ingredients.
8. Carefully fill each muffin cup about 2/3 full with batter.
9. Dollop an equal amount of cheese mixture onto each muffin in the pan.
10. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown and a toothpick inserted comes out clean.
11. Remove from the oven and let cool on a wire rack.
Weight Watcher Exchanges: 1-1/4 Fat, 1/4 Protein, 1/4 Vegetable, 1 Bread, 1/2 Fruit, 65 Optional Calories.
Nutritional Analysis per serving:
236 calories
6 g protein
8 g fat
35 g carbohydrate
56 mg calcium
260 mg sodium
5 mg cholesterol
2 g dietary fiber
Calories from fat: 29%
